brand.name: Al-Maani Al-Wataniya
brand.tagline: Importing Medical Equipment, Supplies & Mother and Child Essentials

hero.title: Medical Equipment & Mother-and-Child Essentials, Delivered with Care
hero.subtitle: Al-Maani Al-Wataniya imports and supplies dependable medical devices, clinical consumables, and mother & child essentials — connecting hospitals, clinics, and homes with trusted manufacturers around the world.
hero.imageAlt: Modern medical equipment arranged in a clean clinical setting

intro.title: Supplying Healthcare with Confidence
intro.paragraph1: Al-Maani Al-Wataniya was established to make trusted medical technology easier to obtain. We import a wide range of equipment and supplies directly from reputable international manufacturers and bring them to the providers and families who need them.
intro.paragraph2: Our catalog reaches across hospital departments and everyday care alike — from imaging and surgical systems to clinical furniture, consumables, and dedicated mother & child products — all chosen for dependability and value.

sourcing.title: Direct Importing
sourcing.desc: We source straight from certified factories across Europe, Asia, and beyond — with no unnecessary middlemen.

expertise.title: Sector Knowledge
expertise.desc: Our team understands the clinical, technical, and regulatory side of every product we carry.

distribution.title: Dependable Supply
distribution.desc: A well-organized supply line that keeps shelves stocked and orders on schedule.

support.title: After-Sales Care
support.desc: Installation, guidance, and service that continue long after delivery.

categories.title: Everything Modern Care Requires
categories.subtitle: Three core ranges covering the equipment, furniture, and consumables that clinics rely on daily.

equipment.title: Medical Equipment
equipment.desc: Imaging, diagnostic, and surgical devices selected for accuracy and long-term reliability.

furniture.title: Medical Furniture
furniture.desc: Beds, wheelchairs, trolleys, and ward furnishings designed for comfort and durability.

supplies.title: Medical Supplies
supplies.desc: Dressings, protective wear, and everyday consumables that meet international safety norms.

whyUs.title: A Supplier You Can Count On
whyUs.subtitle: The reasons clinics and hospitals choose Al-Maani Al-Wataniya again and again.

quality.title: Verified Quality
quality.desc: Each item comes from approved manufacturers and is checked against recognized standards.

partnerships.title: Trusted Manufacturers
partnerships.desc: Established ties with respected medical brands worldwide.

distribution.title: Organized Logistics
distribution.desc: A supply network that delivers accurately, wherever you operate.

pricing.title: Fair Pricing
pricing.desc: Clear, honest pricing that respects your budget without cutting corners.

support.title: Expert Assistance
support.desc: Consultation, training, and responsive support whenever you need it.

trusted.title: Proven Reliability
trusted.desc: A dependable record of serving hospitals, clinics, and families.

featured.title: Chosen by Care Professionals
featured.subtitle: A glimpse into our wider range of medical solutions.

partners.title: Backed by Leading Global Manufacturers
partners.subtitle: We collaborate with established producers to bring you authentic products.

certifications.title: Held to Recognized Standards
certifications.subtitle: Our quality commitment is supported by internationally accepted certifications.

iso13485.title: ISO 13485
iso13485.desc: Quality management certification specific to medical devices.

iso9001.title: ISO 9001
iso9001.desc: The global benchmark for sound quality management.

ce.title: CE Marking
ce.desc: Compliance with European health, safety, and environmental requirements.

fda.title: FDA Compliant
fda.desc: Products meeting U.S. Food & Drug Administration expectations.

cta.title: Let's Equip Better Care, Together
cta.subtitle: Work with us for reliable medical equipment and supplies you can trust.

hero.title: Bringing Trusted Medical Supplies Closer to Care
hero.subtitle: We are an importing and supply company focused on delivering quality medical equipment, consumables, and mother & child products to the communities we serve.

story.title: Built Around Dependable Supply
story.paragraph1: Al-Maani Al-Wataniya began with a straightforward goal — to make quality medical products easier to access and rely on. From early import work, we have grown into a broad supply operation serving healthcare across the sector.
story.paragraph2: We work with hospitals, clinics, pharmacies, and families, offering a catalog that ranges from diagnostic systems and clinical furniture to everyday consumables and mother & child essentials. Every product we bring in reflects our focus on quality and trust.
story.highlight: What drives us is simple — to connect dependable medical technology with the people who rely on it every day.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.desc: To supply healthcare providers and families with reliable, quality medical equipment and consumables — imported through trusted manufacturers and delivered with attentive service.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.desc: To become a leading and trusted medical supply company in the region, known for quality, honesty, and a genuine commitment to better care.

values.title: The Principles Behind Our Work
values.subtitle: Six values that guide how we choose products and treat our partners.

integrity.title: Integrity
integrity.desc: We deal honestly and openly in every order and relationship.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.desc: We hold our catalog and service to a high standard.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.desc: We welcome technology that improves the quality of care.

reliability.title: Reliability
reliability.desc: We keep our commitments, order after order.

quality.title: Quality
quality.desc: We never compromise on what keeps patients safe.

customerFocus.title: Customer Focus
customerFocus.desc: We put our partners and the people they care for first.

process.title: From Sourcing to Your Door
process.subtitle: A clear four-step approach that protects quality at every stage.

sourcing.title: Sourcing
sourcing.desc: We find and partner with certified manufacturers, choosing only products that meet our quality bar.

inspection.title: Inspection
inspection.desc: Every shipment is checked and verified against medical standards before it moves on.

logistics.title: Import & Handling
logistics.desc: Our team manages customs, compliance, and careful handling to protect each product.

distribution.title: Delivery & Support
distribution.desc: We deliver on schedule and stand behind every order with installation and support.

quality.title: Quality You Can Check
quality.subtitle: Our quality approach safeguards patients and partners at every step.

points.certified: Sourced only from ISO and CE certified manufacturers
points.inspection: Every incoming shipment inspected at multiple points
points.traceability: Complete documentation and traceability for each product
points.coldchain: Careful, validated handling for temperature-sensitive items
points.compliance: Ongoing alignment with international regulatory standards
points.audit: Routine supplier audits and performance checks

partnerships.title: Linked to Respected Makers Worldwide
partnerships.desc: Our network is our foundation. We hold direct, lasting relationships with leading manufacturers across Europe, Asia, and North America — giving our partners genuine, up-to-date medical products with full factory support.

hero.title: Browse Our Medical Range
hero.subtitle: A broad selection of medical equipment, furniture, and supplies — imported from manufacturers we trust.

hero.title: Let's Talk About What You Need
hero.subtitle: Have a question about a product or want to begin a supply partnership? Our team is here to help.
